title: Mutagen
description: Brew a new kind of splash potion that turns peaceful mobs into useful mutated versions!
body:
**Made for Modfest 1.20**

## New Potion: Splash Mutagen

This is the entrypoint for the mod. Brew this in a brewing stand (glowstone -> spider eye -> gunpowder). Throw it at . . . well, salmon for right now. It only works on salmon. More coming though!

## Mutated Creatures

Mutants are typically enlarged mount versions of peaceful mobs. Salmon are a versatile underwater mount. Make sure to bring water-breathing equipment, you might have an underwater mount but you're on your own for oxygen.
